zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Biset於大約1156年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特時，他的父親Manasser Biset25歲，母親Alice Falaise22歲。他與Aubrey fitzRichard結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1195年之前在英國武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Biset于大约1156年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特时，他的父亲Manasser Biset25岁，母亲Alice Falaise22岁。他与Aubrey fitzRichard结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1195年之前在英国武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Biset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Bissett  .
French: from a diminutive of Old French bisse ‘fine linen’ (see Bisson ).

variants.name: Bissett
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French biset ‘dark’, a diminutive of bis (see Biss ).

Altered form of French Bizet: nickname for someone with a dark complexion, derived from bis ‘grayish-brown’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Bissette .

History: The surname Bissett (see 1 above) was brought to Scotland from Nottinghamshire c. 1175 by Henricus Byset, an Englishman who became a retainer of King William the Lion. — It was Jean George Bizet from Haute-Saône, France, whose surname was changed to Bissett (see 2 above) after his immigration to NS, Canada, in 1752.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Biset was born about 1156, in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Manasser Biset, was 25 and his mother, Alice Falaise, was 22. He married Aubrey fitzRichard. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 1195, in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Biset est né environ 1156, à Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Manasser Biset, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Falaise, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Aubrey fitzRichard. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 1195, à Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Biset um 1156 in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manasser Biset 25 und seine Mutter Alice Falaise 22. Er hat Aubrey fitzRichard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1195 in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Biset è nato il circa 1156 nel Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Manasser Biset, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Falaise, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Aubrey fitzRichard. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1195, nel Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Bisetが約1156年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスターで生まれた時，父Manasser Bisetは25歳，母Alice Falaiseは22歳であった。Aubrey fitzRichardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1195年以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Biset(이)가 대략 1156년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 키더민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manasser Biset(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Falaise(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Aubrey fitzRichard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1195년 이전 영국 워스스터실르 키더민스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Biset nasceu aproximadamente 1156, em Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Manasser Biset, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Falaise, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Aubrey fitzRichard. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1195, em Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Biset родился около 1156 г. в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Manasser Biset было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Falaise, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Aubrey fitzRichard. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 1195 г. в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Biset nació aproximadamente 1156, en Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Manasser Biset, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Falaise, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Aubrey fitzRichard. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1195, en Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
